partsGuide.name: Frame
partsGuide.purpose: Main structure that holds wheels and components; determines fit, stiffness, and ride feel.

partsGuide.name: Fork
partsGuide.purpose: Holds the front wheel and steers the bike; on MTBs often a suspension fork for bump absorption.

partsGuide.name: Wheels (rim + spokes + hub)
partsGuide.purpose: Roll on tires; hubs contain bearings; drivetrain connects at the rear hub.

partsGuide.name: Tires
partsGuide.purpose: Grip and cushion; tread and width suit road, gravel, or trail.

partsGuide.name: Handlebar & stem
partsGuide.purpose: Steering control and cockpit position; stem sets reach and height to the bar.

partsGuide.name: Brakes
partsGuide.purpose: Slow and stop—disc calipers squeeze rotors or rim brakes contact the wheel rim.

partsGuide.name: Crankset & pedals
partsGuide.purpose: Convert leg power into rotation; chainrings define gearing with the cassette.

partsGuide.name: Chain & cassette
partsGuide.purpose: Transfers power to the rear wheel; cassette cogs provide gear range.

partsGuide.name: Derailleurs & shifters
partsGuide.purpose: Move the chain across chainrings (front) and cassette (rear) for easier or harder gears.

partsGuide.name: Seatpost & saddle
partsGuide.purpose: Support rider weight and set saddle height/fore-aft for pedaling comfort.

partsGuide.name: Suspension fork
partsGuide.purpose: Absorbs front impacts to maintain traction and control on rough terrain.

partsGuide.name: Rear shock (full-suspension)
partsGuide.purpose: Lets the rear wheel track bumps; linkage designs vary by bike category.

partsGuide.name: Dropper post
partsGuide.purpose: Lowers saddle on demand for steep descents; raises for efficient climbing.

partsGuide.name: Wide handlebar
partsGuide.purpose: More leverage for steering precision and stability at speed off-road.

partsGuide.name: Disc brakes
partsGuide.purpose: Consistent stopping in mud and wet; rotors dissipate heat on long descents.

partsGuide.name: Knobby tires
partsGuide.purpose: Tread digs into loose surfaces; lower pressures increase grip on trails.

partsGuide.name: 1x drivetrain
partsGuide.purpose: Single front chainring with wide-range cassette—simple shifting on technical terrain.

partsGuide.name: Head tube
partsGuide.purpose: Houses the steerer; defines stack and houses headset bearings for steering.

partsGuide.name: Top tube / down tube
partsGuide.purpose: Connect head tube to seat cluster and bottom bracket; major structural triangle members.

partsGuide.name: Seat tube
partsGuide.purpose: Holds the seatpost; angle influences saddle position relative to pedals.

partsGuide.name: Chainstays & seatstays
partsGuide.purpose: Rear triangle members connecting bottom bracket and seat cluster to the rear axle.

partsGuide.name: Bottom bracket shell
partsGuide.purpose: Interface for crank bearings; width and standard must match your crankset.
